title: vicia americana var. linearis
intro: Vicia americana var. linearis, also known as the American vetch or American hairy vetch, is a variety of the American vetch plant, a legume native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Vicia americana var. linearis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
